billingPolicy.title: Billing Policy
billingPolicy.subtitle: Frequently asked questions about billing and subscription

q1.question: When does billing start?
q1.answer: After the 14-day free trial, the system will NOT automatically charge you. You must manually select a plan and make a payment. If you don't upgrade, you'll continue with 5 free leads/month.

q2.question: Is there auto-renewal?
q2.answer: Monthly and annual plans auto-renew. You can cancel anytime from the Billing page in the platform. When canceled, you can still use the service until the end of your current billing cycle.

q3.question: How to get VAT invoice?
q3.answer: For customers needing VAT invoices: 1) Go to Billing > Invoices 2) Click 'Request VAT Invoice' 3) Fill in company details 4) Confirm. System will send VAT invoice within 3-7 business days.

q4.question: What happens on cancel?
q4.answer: When you cancel your plan: 1) You can still use the service until the end of your current billing cycle 2) All data is retained for 90 days 3) After 90 days, data is permanently deleted from the system. You can export data before canceling.

q5.question: Refund process?
q5.answer: For annual plans: 1) Cancel plan from Billing page 2) Send email to billing@solariqapp.com with account name and reason 3) Team reviews within 3 business days 4) Prorated refund (minus days used) within 5-14 business days. Note: Monthly plans are non-refundable.

pdpa.title: PDPA Compliance Center
pdpa.subtitle: Your privacy rights under Thailand's Personal Data Protection Act

overview.title: 1. PDPA Compliance Overview
overview.description: SolarIQ is committed to complying with Thailand's Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA) B.E. 2562. We respect your privacy and have implemented comprehensive security measures to protect your personal data.
overview.certifiedNote: Our systems are designed and built following PDPA principles from the ground up (Privacy by Design)

dataCategories.title: 2. Data Categories Collected
dataCategories.description: We collect personal data necessary to provide our services effectively

dataPurposes.title: 3. Data Purposes
dataPurposes.description: We use your personal data for the following purposes:

dataRetention.title: 4. Data Retention
dataRetention.description: We retain your personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was processed and as required by law. When the retention period expires, we securely delete or destroy the data.
dataRetention.note: Note: If you request data deletion before the specified period, we will process your request as a data subject, except where data must be retained by law.

subprocessors.title: 5. Subprocessor List
subprocessors.description: We use third-party service providers (subprocessors) to support our operations. All subprocessors are carefully selected and have non-disclosure agreements (NDAs) in place.

crossBorder.title: 6. Cross-Border Data Transfer
crossBorder.description: Most of your personal data is stored and processed in the Asia Southeast 1 (Singapore) region. However, we may transfer data to other countries in certain cases, such as:
cases: Using services from subprocessors located in other countries
Data processing for security and backup purposes
crossBorder.certification: Certification: We have data protection measures equivalent to PDPA standards and appropriate cross-border data transfer agreements with all subprocessors.

security.title: 7. Security Measures
security.description: We employ comprehensive security measures to protect your personal data:

userRights.title: 8. Data Subject Rights
userRights.description: Under PDPA, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:

dpoContact.title: 9. DPO Contact Information
dpoContact.description: If you have questions or concerns about privacy or PDPA compliance, you can contact our Data Protection Officer (DPO):
dpoContact.name: Name:

dsrPortal.title: 10. Data Subject Request Portal
dsrPortal.description: You can use the Data Subject Request (DSR) Portal to manage your rights:
dsrPortal.submitDescription: Request access, correction, deletion, or export of your data

footer.commitment: SolarIQ is committed to protecting your privacy

dsr.title: Data Subject Request Portal
dsr.subtitle: Manage your rights under PDPA
dsr.importantNote: We will process your request within 30 days as required by PDPA. You will receive a confirmation email after submitting your request.

form.emailRequired: We will send a verification code to this email to verify your identity
